'''woshashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swaglike|swaglike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swaglike|swaglike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| woshashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshashithi|woshashithi]] || [[word:woshashiji|woshashiji]] || [[word:woshashishi|woshashishi]] || [[word:woshashiki|woshashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshashuthuthu|woshashuthuthu]] || [[word:woshashujuju|woshashujuju]] || [[word:woshashushushu|woshashushushu]] || [[word:woshashukuku|woshashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshashuthu|woshashuthu]] || [[word:woshashuju|woshashuju]] || [[word:woshashushu|woshashushu]] || [[word:woshashuku|woshashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshashufthuf|woshashufthuf]] || [[word:woshashufjuf|woshashufjuf]] || [[word:woshashufshuf|woshashufshuf]] || [[word:woshashufkuf|woshashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshashethe|woshashethe]] || [[word:woshasheje|woshasheje]] || [[word:woshasheshe|woshasheshe]] || [[word:woshasheke|woshasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshashothotho|woshashothotho]] || [[word:woshashojojo|woshashojojo]] || [[word:woshashoshosho|woshashoshosho]] || [[word:woshashokoko|woshashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshashotho|woshashotho]] || [[word:woshashojo|woshashojo]] || [[word:woshashosho|woshashosho]] || [[word:woshashoko|woshashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshashofthof|woshashofthof]] || [[word:woshashofjof|woshashofjof]] || [[word:woshashofshof|woshashofshof]] || [[word:woshashofkof|woshashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfthĂŻf|woshashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfjĂŻf|woshashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfshĂŻf|woshashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfkĂŻf|woshashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|woshashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|woshashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|woshashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|woshashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfthĂŻf|woshashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfjĂŻf|woshashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfshĂŻf|woshashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfkĂŻf|woshashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfthĂŻf|woshashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfjĂŻf|woshashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfshĂŻf|woshashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:woshashĂŻfkĂŻf|woshashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshashĂŠthĂŠ|woshashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:woshashĂŠjĂŠ|woshashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:woshashĂŠshĂŠ|woshashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:woshashĂŠkĂŠ|woshashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshashathatha|woshashathatha]] || [[word:woshashajaja|woshashajaja]] || [[word:woshashashasha|woshashashasha]] || [[word:woshashakaka|woshashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshashatha|woshashatha]] || [[word:woshashaja|woshashaja]] || [[word:woshashasha|woshashasha]] || [[word:woshashaka|woshashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshashafthaf|woshashafthaf]] || [[word:woshashafjaf|woshashafjaf]] || [[word:woshashafshaf|woshashafshaf]] || [[word:woshashafkaf|woshashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:woshashasha|woshashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:woshashĂ«sha|woshashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woshashrosha|woshashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woshashmusha|woshashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:woshashyasha|woshashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoshashnkshĂ«sha|gowoshashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoshashnkrosha|gowoshashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoshashnkmusha|gowoshashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoshashnkyasha|gowoshashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:woshashashasha|woshashashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:woshashashĂ«sha|woshashashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woshashashrosha|woshashashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woshashashmusha|woshashashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:woshashashyasha|woshashashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoshashashnkshĂ«sha|gowoshashashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoshashashnkrosha|gowoshashashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoshashashnkmusha|gowoshashashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoshashashnkyasha|gowoshashashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:weshĂŠshasha|weshĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:weshĂŠshĂ«sha|weshĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:weshĂŠshrosha|weshĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:weshĂŠshmusha|weshĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:weshĂŠshyasha|weshĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goweshĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|goweshĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goweshĂŠshnkrosha|goweshĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goweshĂŠshnkmusha|goweshĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goweshĂŠshnkyasha|goweshĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:woshfashasha|woshfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:woshfashĂ«sha|woshfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woshfashrosha|woshfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woshfashmusha|woshfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:woshfashyasha|woshfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoshfashnkshĂ«sha|gowoshfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoshfashnkrosha|gowoshfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoshfashnkmusha|gowoshfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoshfashnkyasha|gowoshfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
